Contact CTA (phone/email) is clear but visually could be more prominent for WhatsApp/mobile formats.
QR section in the bottom right slightly overlaps normal content, feels a bit like a sticker rather than organically integrated.
Minor crowding in position listings—dense use of space but not unreadable.
Agency/verification line at the bottom is readable but very small; could be very slightly more prominent, though this is minor.

requiredCorrections.note: Increase visual weight of the phone and email CTA in the lower part—could use slightly larger font, punchier color, or bolder formatting for WhatsApp/mobile visibility.
Better integrate the QR code within the layout—a more evident card/ribbon treatment would keep it from appearing as a sticker.
